subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Now, in this utmost heat, when the blaze of summer is even as a flaming furnace, this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی الان در نهایت گرما که حرارت تموز چون تنور آتش افروز است این عبد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
